mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, baidu_group_id, baidu_user_id, face_image_url, face_image_object_key, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_face_bindings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND enabled = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, baidu_group_id, baidu_user_id, face_image_url, face_image_object_key, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_face_bindings WHERE baidu_group_id = #{groupId} AND baidu_user_id = #{baiduUserId} AND enabled = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_face_bindings ( id, user_id, baidu_group_id, baidu_user_id, face_image_url, face_image_object_key, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{groupId}, #{baiduUserId}, #{faceImageUrl}, #{faceImageObjectKey}, TRUE, now(), now() )
